texto: Now I have a guy trying to change me and I don’t want to be changed, yet I keep hanging in there, hoping that he learns to like what he sees. Isn't that the prime definition of insanity, repeating the same thing over and over and expecting a different outcome? My man-radar is busted, so you’ll have to excuse my disbelief in what you say.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Celeste Prater: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Now I have a guy trying to change me and I don’t want to be changed, yet I keep hanging in there,…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, erotic-romance, trying pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e reflexao.
